description: Shared Apache mod_status contract fixture between fivenines-agent and fivenines-server. Source of truth: fivenines-agent tests/fixtures/apache_contract_payload.json, asserted end-to-end by tests/test_apache.py::test_contract_fixture_round_trip (only requests.get is mocked -- 'raw_auto' is fed back as response.text and 'server_header' as the Server header, and apache_metrics(**config['apache']) must equal payload['apache']). The server's spec/requests/api_collect_apache_spec.rb posts payload['apache'] under data['apache'] through /collect and asserts Ingesters::Agent ingests it. 'config', 'raw_auto' and 'server_header' are agent-side inputs the server ignores. Change the payload shape only in lockstep across both repos.
